Container.Name: ClaudeDevEnv
Container.Overview: Development environment containing the .NET 8 SDK, Node.js 20, npm, git, GitHub CLI (gh), Claude CLI and the Claude Discord plugin. Ideal for AI-assisted .NET and web development directly on your Unraid server.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID that the container process runs as. Match your Unraid 'nobody' UID (99) or your own UID.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID that the container process runs as. Match your Unraid 'users' GID (100) or your own GID.

Config.Name: Workspace
Config.Description: Working directory mounted inside the container. Map to a folder on your Unraid array or cache drive.

Config.Name: Claude Config
Config.Description: Persists Claude CLI configuration and session data across container restarts.

Config.Name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
Config.Description: (Optional) Discord bot token for the Claude Discord plugin. Leave blank if you do not use the Discord plugin.
